scenarios.description: children() returns cached list when userData cache present and modCount matches (cachedChildren non-null, no rebuild)
scenarios.precondition: an Element with two child Elements, after first children() call to populate cache
scenarios.expectedResult: second children() returns same Elements instance (cache hit) with two items, no rebuild
pseudocode: TEST TC07 children cache-hit when modCount unchanged
Elements first = parent.children();            // builds cache with modCount==2
Elements second = parent.children();           // cachedChildren sees userData & matching modCount
assertSame(first.unwrap(), second.unwrap());   // underlying list instance identical

scenarios.description: children() rebuilds list when cachedChildren returns stale reference due to forced null ref in userData
scenarios.precondition: an Element with two child Elements, after cache population, then manual userData clear of childElsKey
scenarios.expectedResult: children() detects null WeakReference and rebuilds a fresh list of two elements
pseudocode: TEST TC08 children rebuild when userData cache ref cleared
Elements afterStale = parent.children();         // sees ref.get()==null, rebuilds list
